memo_reasons: no artifact-backed original results survived validation
no original result resolved to a real saved artifact

reference_catalog.text: GitHub repository page indicating the accessible BRFSS mirror is a diabetes-focused derived dataset rather than a full BRFSS file with e-cigarette and epilepsy variables. Accession: turn3view0. web.open. Repository README states the project uses a Kaggle Diabetes Health Indicators dataset derived from CDC BRFSS 2015 with diabetes-related predictors such as BMI, smoking, physical activity, blood pressure, and general health.

Web search results for BRFSS 2015 diabetes mirror and related descriptions. Accession: turn0search0. web.search_query. Search results consistently described the mirrored dataset as a diabetes health indicators dataset with a limited set of derived variables, not a full tobacco-and-neurology surveillance file.

summary: Routing to a research memo because the run did not clear the paper gate.
